prose:
Property: total electronic energy of methanol (optimized geometry), units eV.
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) using the xtb backend, no Gaussian basis or DFT functional involved.
Geometry provenance: the supplied methanol.xyz file (6 atoms) was relaxed with the ASE BFGS optimizer until the MAX force fell below 0.05 eV Å⁻¹ (9 steps; converged true). The reported energy is therefore the optimized GFN2-xTB energy, i.e. GFN2-xTB//GFN2-xTB.
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software: xtb (via chemkit), geometry optimization driven by ASE  BFGS.
Convergence & caveats: SCF and geometry optimization both converged; no warnings were returned by the engine.
Reproducibility: optimized structure written to /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/geometry-optimize-validation/methanol/20260624-114742_methanol_geometry_optimize/methanol_xtb_opt.xyz . Command (from result JSON): /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py opt --method xtb /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/geometry-optimize-validation/methanol/methanol.xyz --out /var/folders/ym/_02kbfyd29z17l376783nlm00000gn/T/tmpuk70gp9w/live.json .
Headline result (total energy, eV): −223.84402 eV
